workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what visible proof the agent must show that ECC context was loaded before grilling.
workflow_runs.decision: For agentic workflow work, workflow_intake must load the repo ECC instructions, Matt Pocock flow, relevant skill files, workflow lane docs, tracker status, tests/validators, and adjacent connected files before grilling or PRD. Grilling and PRDs must explicitly refer to ECC contract terms: repeated job, trigger/refusal, input contract, output artifact, agent lanes, tool/action space, raw evidence, validation loop, safety boundary, skill surface, handoff, and human boundary.
